testimonials.title: Stories and impressions
testimonials.subtitle: What people say about Nur & Garden.

items.name: Dilshod M.
items.quote: Nur & Garden brought quality and trust back to our table. Amazing pilaf!

items.name: Sofia L.
items.quote: The tea smells so fresh and natural. We drink it every day with family.

items.name: Kenji W.
items.quote: The dried fruit mix is delicious — even the kids love it.

items.name: Amina R.
items.quote: Lovely packaging, great taste. Also a wonderful gift.

items.name: Bekzod Y.
items.quote: Nuts are fresh and clean. My trust in the brand only grew.

items.question: Where are your products grown?
items.answer: In certified farms across Fergana, Samarkand and Kashkadarya regions of Uzbekistan.

items.question: How are the packs stored?
items.answer: Food-safe, eco-friendly packs stored away from direct sunlight.

items.question: How long does delivery take?
items.answer: Tashkent — within 24 hours; other regions — 1–3 working days.

items.question: Do you accept wholesale orders?
items.answer: Yes, we offer special terms for restaurants and retailers. Contact us via the Contact page.

items.question: Are your products organic?
items.answer: Most products are grown without chemical additives and go through quality checks.

about.heroSubtitle: Respect for nature, loyalty to tradition, joyful and quality products.

ourStory.title: Our story
ourStory.body: Nur & Garden is a family brand born on the sunny fields of Uzbekistan — delivering natural products with care.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We control every step — from field to pack.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: Care for the land and responsibility for tomorrow.

tradition.title: Tradition
tradition.description: Experience inspired by family heritage and culture.

mission.title: Our mission
paragraphs: Delivering the best of Uzbekistan to every family — simple, open and warm.
We partner with farmers long-term and ensure fair prices.
Nur & Garden — quality, trust and daily energy.

items.title: Selective planting
items.description: Heirloom seeds in small fields, careful step-by-step care.

items.title: Slow maturing
items.description: Grains keep natural oils, polished gently.

items.title: Handcrafted polish
items.description: Equipment tuned by hand — vibrant, healthy product.

items.description: Multiple taste and safety checks before packing.
